name: Waffle Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the potatoes and onion until you have enough to make a batch for the family.
2. Add the flour, egg substitute (or eggs), salt, and pepper to the grated potatoes and mix well with just enough water to form a batter that holds together without being too wet.
3. Spray a non-stick waffle iron lightly with Pam or another cooking spray.
4. Pour the potato mixture into the prepared waffle iron and cook until golden brown on both sides.
5. Serve hot with plenty of applesauce, if desired. If you don't have a waffle iron, press the batter into a preheated cast-iron pan or griddle over medium heat, cooking in batches as needed, until crispy and golden brown.
